fields.title: tests: worker sandbox/approval inheritance
fields.description:
## Task

Add vitest coverage for worker sandbox/approval inheritance and `session_id` resnapshot semantics.

## Files

- `extensions/tau/test/task-worker-sandbox.test.ts` (new)

## Coverage

- Policy clamping (filesystem/network/allowlist/approval ordering)
- Re-snapshot behavior: same session_id, different parent config → effective worker policy updates
- Approval broker fallback: with broker vs without broker

## DoD

- `npm -C extensions/tau test` passes.
fields.close_reason: Implemented worker sandbox/approval inheritance, clamping, per-call resnapshot, approval broker routing, and vitest coverage
